partners.title: Our partners
partners.desc1: MBA, ACCA, CPA, ex-Associate KPMG, ex-CFO of NYSE-listed companies, with over 20 years of experience in US and Uzbek business.
partners.desc2: DipIFR, CPA Uz, ACCA Affiliate. Chief Accountant with 15+ years of experience in international companies.
partners.desc3: CCIM, FIABCI, ex-partner CMWP Uzbekistan, Commonwealth Partnership. Real estate market expert in Tashkent with 20+ years of experience.

painPoints.title: Do you recognize yourself?
painPoints.description: You want to start a business in Uzbekistan but don't know where to begin. Registration, taxes, reporting — it all seems complicated and time-consuming.
painPoints.item1Desc: Unclear which documents are needed for LLC or sole proprietorship, how to fill forms, where to apply
painPoints.item2Desc: Mistakes in applications lead to rejections from authorities and lost time
painPoints.item3Desc: Fear of fines due to late filing or incorrect accounting
painPoints.item5Desc: Hours in queues and studying rules instead of running your business
painPoints.item6Desc: No one to ask about accounting, taxes, or legal changes
painPoints.conclusion: You end up spending weeks on paperwork, risk fines, and lose focus on business — instead of growing your company.

benefits.title: Three things you get
benefits.item1Desc: We help prepare documents and complete LLC or sole proprietorship registration without the runaround.
benefits.item2Desc: Bookkeeping and on-time filing. You run the business — we handle the books.
benefits.item3Desc: We provide the right location for your company — both a legal address for registration and premises for your office.
benefits.item3Highlight: Legal address and office under one roof

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.quote1: We registered an LLC in Tashkent — BizReg did everything in two days. Documents prepared, went to the tax office together. Highly recommend.
testimonials.quote2: We were looking for outsourced accounting — they also helped with registration and now do our books. Fair prices, quick responses.
testimonials.quote3: Sole proprietorship registration and tax sign-up — all done remotely. Very clear and no extra hassle.

product.title: What is
product.description1: BizReg is a business registration and accounting service in Tashkent. LLC, sole proprietorship, tax registration, reporting.
product.description2: We help you register a company or sole proprietorship quickly and correctly, then handle bookkeeping and filing — so you can focus on business.
product.locationsDesc: Registration and support for companies across Uzbekistan
product.feature1: LLC and sole proprietorship registration in Tashkent

about.title: BizReg
about.titleSuffix: — business registration and accounting in Tashkent
about.description: We help register LLC and sole proprietorship in Tashkent and provide accounting. Experience working with entrepreneurs and companies from Uzbekistan and abroad.
about.whoDesc1: BizReg is a business registration and accounting service in Tashkent.
about.whoDesc2: We prepare documents for LLC and sole proprietorship registration, help with tax registration, and provide bookkeeping for small and medium business.
about.whoDesc3: Our team includes lawyers and accountants who know Uzbekistan law and help you stay compliant and avoid fines.
about.missionDesc1: To make starting and running a business in Tashkent simple and predictable. Registration and accounting — without the stress.
about.missionDesc2: We work transparently: fixed rates, clear deadlines, support when you need it.
about.value1Desc: Documents on time. Reporting on time. We work within the law.
about.value2Desc: We answer questions and tailor packages to your needs.
about.value3Desc: Registration in 1–2 days, responses within 15 minutes.
about.offer1Desc: Document preparation and registration with authorities turnkey.
about.offer2Desc: Registration with tax authority and extra-budgetary funds.
about.offer4Desc: Consultations on taxes and legal changes.
about.offer6Desc: Full accounting support for small and medium business.
about.why1: Experience in registration and accounting in Uzbekistan
about.clientsDesc: Sole proprietors and LLCs across industries — from startups to established business
about.requisitesExperienceValue: Business registration and accounting in Tashkent

guarantees.title: Your safety is our priority
guarantees.description: We guarantee deadlines, transparent terms, and data confidentiality.
guarantees.what1Desc: We sign a service agreement. Contract in Russian and English on request.
guarantees.what2Desc: LLC/sole proprietorship registration — as agreed; reporting — by due dates.
guarantees.what3Desc: We do not share client data with third parties.
guarantees.what5Desc: We fix our mistakes at our expense.
guarantees.what6Desc: We answer questions within 15 minutes during business hours.
guarantees.us2: Registration and accounting in one place
guarantees.us6: We work in Tashkent and across Uzbekistan
guarantees.others4: Risk of late filings and fines
guarantees.refundDesc: Refund terms are agreed individually and set out in the contract. Refund before work starts is possible by agreement.
guarantees.refundNote: Important: For accounting services, refund for unused period is considered upon request.
